title: More Smeltable Items
description: Adds smelting recipes to every item made of gold, iron, copper, diamond, or quartz.
body:
## Features Adds recipes to get metals, quartz, or diamonds back from smelting any items that contain those ingredients. Here are all the recipes:
Items smeltable to iron nuggets
  • Any rails made of iron
  • Blast furnace
  • Bucket
  • Chain
  • Compass and recovery compass
  • Crossbow
  • Flint and steel
  • Iron bars
  • Lanterns
  • Pistons
  • Shears
  • Shield
  • Smithing table
  • Stonecutter
  • Tripwire hook
  • Hanging sign
  • Saddles
Items smeltable to iron ingots
  • Anvil
  • Cauldron
  • Crafter
  • Hopper
  • Iron door and trapdoor
  • Iron pressure plate
  • Any minecart
  • Lodestone
Items smeltable to gold nuggets
  • Bell
  • Clock
  • Gold pressure plate
  • Powered rail
  • Golden apple, carrot, and melon slice
Items smeltable to copper nuggets
  • Brush
  • Copper bars
  • Copper chain
  • Copper lantern
  • Spyglass
  • Trial keys
Items smeltable to copper ingots
  • Lightning rod
  • Any cut copper block, slab or stairs
  • Chiseled copper
  • Copper bulb
  • Copper grate
  • Copper doors and trapdoors
  • Copper chest
  • Copper golem statue
Items smeltable to copper blocks
  • Any waxed/oxidized copper block
Items smeltable to nether quartz
  • Daylight detector
  • Observer
  • Comparator
Items smeltable to diamonds
  • Jukebox
  • Enchanting table
  • Any smithing template
